extension.description: Intercepts video playback and requires a PIN to continue if the content rating is blocked. Supports one-time allows, timed unlocks, and whitelisting for movies, shows, seasons, and episodes. Works with Umbrella, TMDbHelper, and any Kodi video source that passes rating metadata.
extension.news: 1.1.0 — Add post-PIN access menu, one-time allow, hierarchical whitelist, and whitelist management in settings. Improve rating resolution for streamed content. 1.0.2 — Custom PIN dialog showing block reason; D-pad number pad replaces system numeric input. 1.0.1 — Fix thread safety, TMDb IMDB ID lookup, and anonymous player instances. Upgrade settings to Kodi 21 format.
